title: Security Management Program
statement: The entity establishes and maintains an entity-wide information security management program, including risk assessments, policies, and oversight.
guidance: FISCAM general control category. Maps broadly to NIST PM/RA/PL families.

title: Access Control
statement: The entity limits and monitors logical and physical access to information system resources to authorized individuals.
guidance: FISCAM access control category; aligns with NIST AC family.

title: Audit and Monitoring
statement: The entity logs, monitors, and reviews security-relevant events and audit trails.
